name: Parmesan-Basil Cream Sauce - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, add fresh basil and 1 tablespoon white wine.
2. Reduce the mixture by half.
3. Add cream and reduce to a smooth consistency.
4. Remove from heat and add grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and white pepper.
5. Strain and reserve. (The sauce should have a medium consistency.)
